name: New England Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the chuck roast with salt and pepper.
2. Place onions, carrots, and celery in the crock-pot.
3. Top with meat. Add bay leaf, vinegar, and water.
4. Cover and cook on LOW for 5-6 hours, or until meat is tender.
5. Remove meat and turn the heat to HIGH.
6. Add cabbage wedges, cover, and cook on HIGH for 15-20 minutes, or until cabbage is done.
7. Meanwhile, melt butter in a saucepan.
8. Stir in instant minced onion and flour.
9. Drain 1 1/2 cups of broth from the cooking pot.
10. Pour broth, horseradish, salt, and remaining ingredients into the saucepan.
11. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly until thickened and smooth.
12. Serve sauce over roast with vegetables.
